name: llm-router
description: Subscription-aware LLM routing for Claude Code — routes tasks to 20+ providers with complexity classification, pressure-based fallback chains, Codex integration, and cost tracking.

tools.name: llm_classify
tools.description: Classify a prompt's complexity and recommend which Claude model to use

tools.name: llm_route
tools.description: Smart router — classifies task complexity, then routes to the optimal external LLM

tools.name: llm_query
tools.description: Send a general query to the best available LLM, subscription-aware

tools.name: llm_code
tools.description: Coding task — routes to the best coding model (Haiku, Codex, DeepSeek)

tools.name: llm_analyze
tools.description: Deep analysis — routes to the strongest reasoning model

tools.name: llm_research
tools.description: Search-augmented research — routes to Perplexity for web-grounded answers

tools.name: llm_generate
tools.description: Generate creative or long-form content — routes to the best generation model

tools.name: llm_edit
tools.description: Route code-edit reasoning to a cheap model and return exact edit instructions

tools.name: llm_codex
tools.description: Route a task to the local Codex desktop agent (uses OpenAI subscription, not Claude quota)

tools.name: llm_image
tools.description: Generate images via DALL-E, Stable Diffusion, or Flux

tools.name: llm_video
tools.description: Generate short video clips via Sora or RunwayML

tools.name: llm_audio
tools.description: Text-to-speech or speech-to-text via ElevenLabs or Whisper

tools.name: llm_orchestrate
tools.description: Multi-step pipeline orchestration — break complex tasks across multiple model calls

tools.name: llm_stream
tools.description: Stream an LLM response for long-running tasks

tools.name: llm_check_usage
tools.description: Check current Claude subscription usage (session, weekly, Sonnet limits)

tools.name: llm_update_usage
tools.description: Manually update Claude subscription usage data

tools.name: llm_refresh_claude_usage
tools.description: Refresh Claude usage data from the live subscription API

tools.name: llm_usage
tools.description: Show cost and savings summary for the current session

tools.name: llm_health
tools.description: Show provider health status and circuit breaker states

tools.name: llm_providers
tools.description: List all configured providers and their API key status

tools.name: llm_set_profile
tools.description: Switch the active routing profile (budget, balanced, quality, speed)

tools.name: llm_setup
tools.description: Interactive setup wizard — configure API keys, test providers, view routing status

tools.name: llm_quality_report
tools.description: Generate a routing quality report with model performance analytics

tools.name: llm_save_session
tools.description: Save the current session context for future reference

tools.name: llm_pipeline_templates
tools.description: List available multi-step pipeline templates

tools.name: llm_track_usage
tools.description: Track external LLM usage and cost for a completed call

tools.name: llm_rate
tools.description: Rate the quality of a routing decision to improve future routing

tools.name: llm_cache_stats
tools.description: Show prompt classification cache hit rate and savings

tools.name: llm_cache_clear
tools.description: Clear the prompt classification cache

tools.name: llm_dashboard
tools.description: Launch the web dashboard for live cost and routing analytics

resources.description: Live snapshot of router state: profile, tier, providers, health

environments.name: OPENAI_API_KEY
environments.description: OpenAI API key for GPT-4o and o3 access

environments.name: GEMINI_API_KEY
environments.description: Google Gemini API key for Gemini Flash and Pro access

environments.name: ANTHROPIC_API_KEY
environments.description: Anthropic API key (overrides Claude subscription mode)

environments.name: PERPLEXITY_API_KEY
environments.description: Perplexity API key for web-grounded research routing

environments.name: LLM_ROUTER_CLAUDE_SUBSCRIPTION
environments.description: Set 'true' to use Claude Code subscription instead of Anthropic API (recommended)

environments.name: OLLAMA_BASE_URL
environments.description: Ollama endpoint for local model routing (e.g. http://localhost:11434)

environments.name: LLM_ROUTER_DAILY_SPEND_LIMIT
environments.description: Hard daily spend cap in USD (e.g. 1.00). Set 0 to disable.

environments.name: LLM_ROUTER_MONTHLY_BUDGET
environments.description: Soft monthly budget in USD. Router switches to cheaper models when approaching limit.
